text:
Created attachment 211015
shar file for devel/ros-urdfdom version 1.0.4

Update urdfdom to 1.0.4 (ironically enough, the same version that urdfdom_headers is).

The only change that seems to be here is version attribute parsing:

https://github.com/ros/urdfdom/pull/135
